diff: The documents herein define the general Pattern Liquidity Layer operational procedures for interacting with ERC-7540-compliant tokenized vaults. ERC-7540 is a standard interface for vaults representing and managing multiple underlying assets within a single vault. Pattern Liquidity Layer can integrate with various ERC-7540 vaults. For instance-specific parameters (such as vault addresses, asset addresses, and rate limits), refer to the relevant ERC-7540 Instance Configuration Document.
description: Adds documentation for the Pattern Liquidity Layer, including ALM contract addresses, rate limits, Relayer and Freezer Multisigs, and the Maple syrupUSDC Active Instance.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
